creator: rollingbits@gmail.com
text:
After boot0 update/configure with boot0cfg, the two errors

read 1 from 0 to 0x1c0e6340, error: 0x80
read 1 from 0 to 0x1x0e6340, error: 0x80

are displayed on screen. The boot tries to read floppy disk (sound and led alert). The disk is not present. The computer have a 3.5" 1.44M floppy disk drive.

The expected result is that the boot0:
1. do not search for other drives/ media and
2. respect BIOS configuration.

This is a dual boot Intel Pentium 4 computer with Windows XP and FreeBSD 12.0 (p7).
